title: Blueberry
desc: Go on a journey through a woman’s mind from birth to death in this emotional story platformer. Climb the Tower of Life and gather the pieces of Blueberry's shattered memories, find the missing ones and unravel the mystery of her trauma.

title: Escape From Crimson Manor: Trapped Together
desc: "Escape From Crimson Manor - Trapped Together" is a co-op Escape the room puzzle adventure set in a Victorian manor, where you and a partner must work together to solve challenging puzzles and evade the relentless pursuit of the mansion's sinister owner, Can you uncover the dark secrets and escape?

title: Map Map: A Game About Maps
desc: Embark on a cozy treasure hunt as cartographer of an adventure crew. Use your sense of direction to make maps, help your companions and explore idyllic islands.

title: Wild Assault
desc: Wild Assault is an anthro-themed tactical shooter built with Unreal Engine 5, featuring large-scale battlefield gameplay centered around Valiant abilities. Work closely with your team, harness your instincts, and charge into battle to secure victory.

title: Cheap Car Repair
desc: Cheap Car Repair - go back in time to Poland of the 90's. Run your own Cheap Car Repair shop. Look for savings wherever you can. Make lots of money and avoid angry customers!

title: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time
desc: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time is the last hour of a lost (nonexistent) JRPG, "remade” in 3D pixel art complete with director’s commentary, the digital manual, and archival footage.

title: Scad
desc: Scad is an action packed roguelite apocalypse adventure. Fight against zombie hordes, craft & upgrade new weapons and prepare for new missions.

title: Space Diva
desc: An interactive narrative experience about the most flamboyant beings in the universe. Join Carmen, a somewhat absent-minded middle-aged lady who has to endure bizarre situations in her space truck. And possibly mess things up like crazy.

title: Moonsigil Atlas
desc: The deckbuilding roguelike with no energy – play cards using physical space! Slot cards together, manipulate the shape of your cards, and create overpowered combos to break the game!

title: 868-Back
desc:
The Hacker was known as the best of the best, delving into dark servers no one else could penetrate and returning with glittering data to sell on the black market.

Nobody knows why they quit. Some say their will was broken by the dark secrets at the heart of the Mainframe. Some say they simply retired to a penthouse suite in Low Earth Orbit.

But when you leave the world of high-stakes cybercrime, it's hard to stay gone. With a call from an old enemy in need of help..

868-HACK is 868-BACK.

title: One Move Away
desc: One Move Away is a cozy, first-person puzzle game where you pack your belongings for another move and embark on a new chapter in life. With each move, you step into the lives of three unique characters, uncovering their personal stories through the items they take with them—or leave behind.

title: Soulblaze
desc: Soulblaze is a creature-collecting roguelite in which you catch and train creatures called animons to fight your way through several regions and defeat their bosses in tactical turn-based battles with dice rolling mechanics. Build your team, upgrade and customize techniques, collect stickers, and hopefully survive until the end!

title: Trackastrophe!
desc: Trackastrophe! is a puzzle game where you guide an eccentric train through wacky worlds. Add tiles to the map layout, expand your train by collecting train cars, and pray you can get to the other side in one piece!

title: Inkwellers
desc: Online 2 player co-op puzzle adventure game, you and your friend become the Inkwellers! Dwellers of stories who venture into journals to uncover their true meaning. With your friend, you'll explore hidden worlds, solve tricky puzzles, and uncover secrets.

title: Mistaken
desc: The world is lost to eldritch mist. No heroes, no grand purpose—only survival. Build, fight, and carve your path through treacherous lands where the remnants of humanity and horrors beyond reason now roam. Survive… or be Mistaken.

title: Scale the Depths
desc: Fish, scale, sell, repeat. Scale the Depths is a casual fishing game built around this simple but satisfying loop. Feed hungry customers, upgrade your gear, and uncover the many secrets hidden beneath the surface.

title: Compass
desc:
Compass is an open-world VR flying adventure set among otherworldly skies.
You are a scout flying ahead of a wandering Caravan, charting safe routes through unknown skies.

Pilot your ship across shifting landscapes, navigate hazardous environments, solve physical puzzles with grapples, upgrade your vessel, and uncover the secrets of a sky where something stirs within the clouds.

title: Cardburners
desc: CardBurners is a chaotic fast-paced solo or online versus card game. You must play you cards quickly before they burn in your hand! Mix and match completely different sets of cards and rules to create unique action packed games,

title: Do You Even Forklift?
desc: Silly physics-based forklift game inspired by Ghibli and Japan car culture! Use your forklift skills in logic puzzles with many unexpected outcomes!

title: Street Fighter 6: Year 3 - Ingrid
desc: Ingrid, the extradimensional woman of mystery, will bring her sunlight to Street Fighter 6

title: Feywood Wanderers
desc: Explore the Feywood as you defeat enemies in tactical, turn-based battles. Find loot, abilities, secrets and meet helpful denizens of the forest as you delve deeper, customize your character with a great variety of classes, races, and equipment in this highly replayable extraction roguelike.

title: 100 Cats Lost in France Find & Color
desc: Grab your crayons and hunt for 100 hidden cats across a beautifully hand-drawn map. Play solo or invite a friend to join online, then bring each scene to life with guided color-by-numbers or your own palette — all in a relaxing, soothing atmosphere.

title: Kioku: Last Summer
desc: Kioku: Last Summer is a cozy, story-driven adventure where you play as Asti, a young girl spending her first summer on the mysterious island of Kioku. Set in a hand-crafted world blending Scandinavian and Japanese influences, players explore, build friendships, play minigames, uncover secrets, and relive the magic of early 2000s childhood summers.

title: Bounty Brawl: Most Wanted
desc: Welcome to Hunter Haven! Bounty Brawl is a top-down action roguelite shooter for 1-4 players. Here, the hunt is fierce, and betrayal is inevitable. Will you form a fragile alliance with other hunters under the galaxy's most notorious bounties, or go it alone? Who will emerge as the ultimate victor?

title: Sinister Remains
desc: In the shadow of a curse that has endured for decades, explore a town haunted by twisted truths and terrifying events. As you search for the remnants of the past, you’ll uncover the darkness around you and within yourself.

title: Crashout Crew
desc: Time to clock in at DE NILE SHIPPING, the worlds most efficient warehouse! Work together in online co-op with up to 4 players to fulfill orders of increasingly chaotic, physics-based boxes. Time is money, and safety is no concern just try not to crash out!

title: Airport Baggage Simulator
desc: Inspect and sort baggage at the airport! Check suitcases for illegal contents, weight, and destination. Build your own fully automated baggage handling and optimize your terminal's efficiency for maximum profit!

title: UrbexCam
desc: UrbexCAM is a first-person horror exploration game where you and your friends break into eerie, abandoned locations whether it’s a crumbling house, a shut-down mall, or a forgotten factory to dig up the dark secrets behind why they were left behind. Each place has its own disturbing story, and it’s up to you to piece together the truth. But you’ll need to be careful this isn’t just some casual walking in the dark simulator. Try to stay silent and out of sight, because these places are rigged with hidden security cameras, motion sensors, traps, and alarms. One wrong move could alert the cops or something even worse.

title: Belts of Iron
desc:
Belts of Iron is an open world, third-person, factory building game. As a solo developer your support and feedback is crucial to the continued development of the game.
Explore vast procedurally generated worlds where every playthrough offers something new. Venture off in search of rich resource deposits, uncover unique landscapes, and share your favorite world seeds with friends. But beware, exploration comes at a cost, native hostile creatures roam the planet so you'll need to be prepared!

Build sprawling factories that stretch across the terrain, connected with miles of conveyor belts. Merge and split belts of items to optimize production lines and keep your factory running at peak efficiency. From simple smelters to complex oil refineries, every machine pushes your automation further as you expand your industrial empire!

title: E9uations
desc: You are the equal sign(=). Rearrange the numbers and operators to form equation and solve the puzzle.

title: Heroes of Magic and Steel
desc: Build a team of 3 heroes, prepare your deck and dominate tactical battles on a hex grid. Every run demands a different strategy and each card played matters, only going back to your deck on the next run.

title: Wandering Sword
desc:
The hit pixel-art RPG set in the world of Chinese martial arts is finally coming to PlayStation!
Play as a young swordsman gravely injured after being caught in a violent conflict.
Having narrowly escaped death, you set out on a journey to master the martial arts and fulfill your destiny as a true hero in a vast wuxia world.
Includes Original DLC
All DLC released on other platforms is included:
“Immortal Trails Across the Blue Sea”
“Mount Pack: The Supreme Steed”

title: What's the Password?
desc: "What's the Password?" is a minimalistic puzzle game where you decode 4-digit passwords. Featuring over 100 puzzles!

title: The Big Hollow: 1982
desc: A serial killer’s dumping ground is exposed. Find details in the evidence, interpret their behaviors, and prove your worth to the FBI’s new Behavioral Science Unit. A dark, atmospheric 2D animated murder mystery.

title: Office Inspector
desc: Identify anomalies and dangers in a mysterious office complex and make the right decisions to escape using the elevator.

title: Dread Fields
desc: You bought an isolated farm to start a new life. Your peaceful routine is shattered when the former owner's terrible secrets rise from beneath the ground. A slow-burn rural horror.

title: Stardust: Wish of Witch
desc: STARDUST: Wish of Witch is a single-player SRPG beautifully crafted in pixel art. Follow the secret of the wish-granting star and join the adventure of the girl “Star” and the mage “Yu”.

title: Heavy Metal Death Can
desc: Heavy Metal Death Can is a Retro-Inspired Survival-Horror game set on a submarine in an alternate late-70s Swedish setting. Trapped beneath the ocean, you must fight against the terrifying Sludge which has turned your crew into Zombies. Look for survivors and uncover the truth behind the madness.

title: Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered
desc: The Utawarerumono legend reaches a new climax in this sprawling JRPG! As a shadow falls over Yamato once more, Oshtor and friends set out on a fresh adventure—and somewhere, amid white mists, a long slumber approaches its end.

title: Gunsmith Simulator: Heavy Metal DLC
desc: Heavy Metal DLC is a tribute to weapons that don’t do subtle — they just roar. This add-on brings four machine guns to Gunsmith Simulator: MG3, M60, PKP Pecheneg, and M249.

title: Smol Toad
desc: A tiny toad with a big personality lives on your desktop while you work or play. Interact with him, take care of his happiness, avoid overwhelming him, and collect points to unlock hats and unique styles for your little amphibian companion.

title: Mushi
desc: Welcome to Mushi! The next-gen Auto-RPG set in a rich fantasy world. This is a feature-packed incremental idle game, meaning that it mostly plays on its own. Your hero will automatically defeat enemies and level up on your screen while you do other things. Begin your rise from level 1 today!

title: Dung Battles
desc: An action puzzle game where you play as a dung beetle, battling against your beetle peers to create the biggest dung ball. Battle online to test your ball rolling skills, strategically roll up items to win in challenge mode, or follow a young beetle's journey home in story mode.

title: Secrets of Velendar Castle: Escape Room
desc: Find your way out of Velendar Castle. Discover why everything was taken from you. In this fantasy Escape room, you will have to solve puzzles to escape the wrath of the king… and find out what he wants from you.

title: Sonki's Lagoon
desc: Dive into Sonki's Lagoon, a colorful low-poly high speed 3D platformer, inspired by the classic. Explore a fun world, pull off stylish moves and find all the Johnnies in this indie adventure!

title: Plush Parade
desc: Design and sell your custom plushies in this cozy and creative sim! Mix and match hundreds of pieces to create unique designs and build your own plush collections. Manage your online shop, launch blind boxes and compete with a rival company to become the ultimate plush designer!

title: Ritualis: Summoner Simulator
desc: An ancient town needs your magic of summoning. Summon bizarre items and creatures to fulfill townsfolk requests. Earn coins and uncover the strange secrets of the locals. Oh, and try to cure your sudden amnesia. It might just save your life!

title: Beat the Champions
desc: Beat the Champions is a fast-paced arcade football game where legendary players clash in explosive matches powered by special abilities. No realism — just speed, skill, and pure competitive chaos.

title: Necrophosis: Full Consciousness
desc:
The complete experience comes alive in Necrophosis: Full Consciousness, a first-person psychological horror adventure with engrossing puzzles that plunges you into a surreal haunting world where only death endures.

Begin as Consciousness, trapped within an emaciated, decaying vessel devoid of memories. Explore grotesque environments cursed with eternal deterioration to unravel fragments of the truth and learn why you have awakened. Soon your journey descends into the darker realms of the subconscious as you become the guiding hand that navigates its shadowy depths while piecing together echoes of the past.

Long forsaken gods have been left to rot beyond eternity, yet something still calls. Prepare for a dark odyssey where every disturbing encounter and mind-expanding puzzle will draw you deeper into the macabre.

title: Demon Kill Demon: Yomi 1984
desc:
Five years have passed since the underground explorer was imprisoned. The darkness that lurks in the underworld bares its fangs once again.

The targets were the students of Yomi High School.

The only way to survive in the hell they are transported to along with their classroom is
to revive the corpses of their friends and use them as fighting forces.

It's not a choice, it's something you have to do to survive.
